pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the waning embers of my own soul. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has been extinguished from my sky. Every breath feels like a theft, a heavy, hollow thing that I no longer wish to claim. To exist in this silence, knowing the betrayal is absolute... it is a cruelty I cannot endure. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through a world that has no place for me. It would be so much more peaceful to simply... cease. To let the darkness take me as it has taken everything else.
